title: Democrats will force vote next week to limit Trump’s war powers in Iran
author: Mike Lillis
fullText: House Democrats will force a vote next week to curb President Trump’s war powers in Iran.  The resolution is expected to fail, given the overwhelming opposition from Republicans and a small handful of Jewish Democrats. But party leaders want to get all lawmakers on the record by using a procedural move to sidestep GOP leaders…
